zh.Venables, Eure, Upper Normandy, France: 法國豪-諾門迪艾雲拿保斯
zh.West Hall, High Leigh, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭戴文希利 聖 瑪麗
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hamon Crompton於1064年出生在法國豪-諾門迪艾雲拿保斯時，他的父親Gilbert Venator 1st Baron Of Kynderton41歲，母親Waltheof39歲。他於1169年與Adeliza Malveysin在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1174年被列為v baron of kinderton。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.West Hall, High Leigh, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰戴文希利 聖 瑪麗
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hamon Crompton于1064年出生在法国豪-諾門迪艾雲拿保斯时，他的父亲Gilbert Venator 1st Baron Of Kynderton41岁，母亲Waltheof39岁。他于1169年与Adeliza Malveysin在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1174年被列为v baron of kinderton。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Crompton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Crumpton
meanings: English: habitational name from Crompton in Lancashire, named with an Old English crumbe ‘river bend’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Hamon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Hamon Crompton was born in 1064, in Venables, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Gilbert Venator 1st Baron Of Kynderton, was 41 and his mother, Waltheof, was 39. He married Adeliza Malveysin in 1169, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. In 1174, at the age of 112, his occupation is listed as v baron of kinderton. He died in his hometown.

fr.West Hall, High Leigh, Cheshire, England: Highley St Mary, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hamon Crompton est né en 1064, à Venables, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Gilbert Venator 1st Baron Of Kynderton, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Waltheof, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Adeliza Malveysin en 1169, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. En 1174, à l’âge de 112 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est v baron of kinderton. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.West Hall, High Leigh, Cheshire, England: Highley St Mary, Devon, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Hamon Crompton 1064 in Venables, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert Venator 1st Baron Of Kynderton 41 und seine Mutter Waltheof 39. Er hat 1169 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Adeliza Malveysin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1174, als er 112 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als v baron of kinderton aufgeführt. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hamon Crompton è nato il nel 1064 nel Venables, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Gilbert Venator 1st Baron Of Kynderton, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Waltheof, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Adeliza Malveysin nel 1169, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1174, all'età di 112 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come v baron of kinderton. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.West Hall, High Leigh, Cheshire, England: イギリスイギリスデボンヒグhリー スト マリー
ja.lifeSummary: Hamon Cromptonが1064年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアベナブレスで生まれた時，父Gilbert Venator 1st Baron Of Kyndertonは41歳，母Waltheofは39歳であった。1169年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでAdeliza Malveysinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1174年，112歳の時，職業はv baron of kindertonと記録されている。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.West Hall, High Leigh, Cheshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 히리 스트 메리
ko.lifeSummary: Hamon Crompton(이)가 1064년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 베나블레스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert Venator 1st Baron Of Kynderton(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Waltheof(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1169년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Adeliza Malveysin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1174년, 112세의 나이로 그의 직업은 v baron of kinderton이었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hamon Crompton nasceu em 1064, em Venables, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Gilbert Venator 1st Baron Of Kynderton, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Waltheof, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Adeliza Malveysin em 1169, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1174, com 112 anos, sua profissão aparece como v baron of kinderton. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.West Hall, High Leigh, Cheshire, England: хаили ст мэри, девон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hamon Crompton родился в 1064 г. в местности венаблесь, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Gilbert Venator 1st Baron Of Kynderton было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Waltheof, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Adeliza Malveysin в 1169 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. В 1174 году, в возрасте 112 лет,  он работал по профессии v baron of kinderton. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.West Hall, High Leigh, Cheshire, England: Highley St Mary, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hamon Crompton nació en 1064, en Venables, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Gilbert Venator 1st Baron Of Kynderton, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Waltheof, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Adeliza Malveysin en 1169, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. En 1174, a la edad de 112 años, su ocupación registrada era v baron of kinderton. Murió en su pueblo.
